title: Bridge Essay: Toward an Embodied, Embedded Predictive Processing Account.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, embedded, enactive, extended mind; critique of computationalism.

**Toward an Embodied, Embedded Predictive Processing Account.**. Front Psychol.. PMID: 33584461. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2021.543076. In this paper, Iargue for an embodied, embedded approach to predictive processing and thus align the framework with situated cognition. The recent popularity of theories conceiving of the brain as apredictive organ has given rise to two broad camps in the literature that Icall free energy enactivism and cognitivist predictive processing.
